title: campanula trachelium var. orientalis
intro: Campanula trachelium var. orientalis, also known as the blue bugle or oriental blue bugle, is a perennial plant species within the Campanula genus. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function, as well as providing antioxidant properties to combat oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Campanula trachelium var. orientalis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in folk medicine and traditional remedies to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
